issue_fixed.name: SVG internal layout overlap / sparkline panel collision
symptoms: Sparkline panel visually overlapped footer chips
Sparkline sat too close to the main KPI value
Footer chips PY, variance %, and status were hard to read

checks.native_assets_rebuilt: pass: python tools/build_native_pbix_assets.py regenerated model/model.bim and build/native_report_layout_project13.json
checks.desktop_model_push: pass: powerbi/push_model_bim_to_desktop.ps1 pushed 92 measures into the open output/dashboard_final.pbix session
checks.power_bi_desktop_save: pass: Power BI Desktop title bar showed Last saved after Ctrl+S on dashboard_final
checks.pbi_tools_extract: pass: pbi-tools extract output/dashboard_final.pbix refreshed output/dashboard_final/

pbix_desktop_visual_check.notes: Power BI Desktop canvas showed KPI cards with the sparkline panel above the footer row; PY, variance, and status chips remained readable with no visible scrollbar or measure-name header. A clean snapshot was checked after closing the slicer dropdown.
